Created attachment 214557
v1

Moin moin 

Most of the Linuxi [1] seem to be using nu-book [2] as an upstream.

To update net-im/kaidan to 0.50 kde@ would like to switch to this one too (as it fails to configure otherwise).

The patch is attached.


mfg Tobias

[1] https://repology.org/project/zxing-cpp-nu-book/versions
[2] https://github.com/nu-book/zxing-cpp
